hooks.command: HIT=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys;d=json.load(sys.stdin);c=str(d.get("tool_input",d).get("command",""));c=c.split(" #")[0];c="".join(" " if ch in "|&;()<>`" else ch for ch in c);t={"grep","egrep","fgrep","rg","ripgrep","ag","ack","find","fd","fdfind"};sys.stdout.write("1" if any(w in t or w.rsplit("/",1)[-1] in t for w in c.split()) else "")' 2>/dev/null || true); if [ "$HIT" = 1 ] && [ -f $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/graphify-out/graph.json ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: graphify-out/graph.json exists. You MUST run `graphify query \"<question>\"` before grepping raw files. Only grep after graphify has oriented you, or to modify/debug specific lines."}}'; fi || true

HIT=$(python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.load(sys.stdin);t=d.get('tool_input',d);s=(str(t.get('file_path') or '')+' '+str(t.get('pattern') or '')+' '+str(t.get('path') or '')).lower().replace(chr(92),'/');exts=('.py','.js','.ts','.tsx','.jsx','.go','.rs','.java','.rb','.c','.h','.cpp','.hpp','.cc','.cs','.kt','.swift','.php','.scala','.lua','.sh','.ex','.exs','.heex');sys.stdout.write('1' if 'graphify-out/' not in s and any(e in s for e in exts) else '')" 2>/dev/null || true); if [ "$HIT" = 1 ] && [ -f $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/graphify-out/graph.json ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: graphify-out/graph.json exists. You MUST run graphify before reading source files. Use: `graphify query \"<question>\"` (scoped subgraph), `graphify explain \"<concept>\"`, or `graphify path \"<A>\" \"<B>\"`. Only read raw files after graphify has oriented you, or to modify/debug specific lines. This rule applies to subagents too — include it in every subagent prompt involving code exploration."}}'; fi || true
